Aristotle taught that a force was always required to keep an object moving. Which of the following states what Newton believed?
facts.truth: An object will keep moving unless an unbalanced force stops it.
distractors: Aristotle was correct for objects on Earth but not in space.
A moving object will eventually stop even though an unbalanced force keeps pushing on it.

Food provides calories needed by the body for energy. However, the body must use energy between meals when food is not consumed. What is the most likely response of the body when more energy is used than the calories consumed provide?
facts.truth: to release energy from lipids stored throughout the body
distractors: to increase blood flow to the limbs for energy production
to transform stored proteins into carbohydrates for energy
to contract muscles to create heat energy for the body

distractors: average the amount of rain that fell during a lightning storm
count number of lightning strikes during a one-hour period
calculate the number of fires that are caused by lightning strikes
